text:
Created attachment 164908
svn diff for audio/id3mtag

New in this version:
+ Several bug fixes
+ Verbose listing of tags
+ Long options
+ Bash autocompletion added (port option "BASH", default: off)

Port specific:
+ Dropped MAKE_ARGS as suggested
+ removed the iconv-related patch ("svn remove files")
